title: Aviator Helmets
description: Craftable Aviator Helmets in the style of Ghast Harnesses.
body:
This pack adds **Aviator Helmets**, a variant of the Leather Helmet in the style of Ghast Harnesses.

**The required Resource Pack can be downloaded from the [versions](https://modrinth.com/project/aviator-helmets/versions) page!**

These helmets are crafted with 4 leather, 1 carpet, and 1 glass pane:
![Crafting Recipe for Aviator Helmets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5433237c1dd7731b5fcc967d149f9d2adc65513f.gif)

While the starting color is determined by the carpet used in crafting, the helmets are dyeable, and can be set to white by washing them in a cauldron.

When worn normally, the aviator helmet looks like a miniature version of the ghast harness, with the goggles worn on top of the head:

![Aviator helmet while not gliding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/961b1644859f64f18d36c92c5df0c778c4ab0f16.png)

While gliding, the goggles of the aviator helmet flip down to be on the player's face:

![Aviator helmet while gliding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c04b48098ed0a9959a42ac995e16407b75f80184.png)

In first-person-view, the aviator helmet activates an overlay and HUD while gliding. This HUD tells the player their current speed, pitch, and remaining elytra durability:

![Example of aviator HUD and ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef57a4b6de742075cea866a4985b3622b87c6dfc.png)

When the player lands, a brief message appears telling the player their total distance flown that trip:

![The distance traveled message on landing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45431d08cd4d4fc6c20ad75c8be543930961501c.png)

Additionally, the aviator helmet provides a small level of protection from damage caused by crashing into walls while flying.

![All Aviator Helmet Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e19f68e5b3b08fb63db4d21e148bbc150fcd6be.png)
